schemas.description: Identifies which schema(s) this resource uses. In this case it is the SCIM core Groups schema.

id.description: A server-assigned, unique identifier for this Group (team).

displayName.description: A human readable name for the Group (team).

members.description: A list of all members that are part of the Group (team).

value.description: A server-assigned, unique identifier for the user (member).

type.description: Type of item - in this case it is User for all members.

display.description: A human-readable name for the user (member), typically the full name.
